exercises.title: SMART Goal Workshop
exercises.description:
Convert these vague goals into SMART goals:
1. Get a better job
2. Learn coding
3. Be healthier
4. Save money
5. Improve relationships
hints: Make each one Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound
If you can't measure it, it's not SMART

solution.code:
1. Get a better job →
By December 2026, I will transition to a mid-level developer role at a tech company earning $X+ salary, by completing 3 portfolio projects and applying to 5 jobs per week starting September.

2. Learn coding →
By June 2026, I will complete a web development course and build 2 real projects, by studying 1 hour daily after work.

3. Be healthier →
By March 2026, I will exercise 4 times per week and lose 5kg, by following a meal plan and running 3x/week + gym 1x/week.

4. Save money →
By December 2026, I will save $5,000, by automatically transferring $420/month to savings and reducing dining out to 2x/week.

5. Improve relationships →
By September 2026, I will call my family weekly and have monthly dinners with close friends, by scheduling these as recurring calendar events.

exercises.title: 90-Day Sprint Plan
exercises.description:
Create your 90-day sprint plan:
1. Pick ONE major goal
2. Break it into 12 weekly milestones
3. Identify daily actions needed
4. Set up a tracking system

solution.code:
90-Day Sprint Template:

Goal: ___
Deadline: ___ (90 days from today)

Week 1-3: Foundation
- Week 1: ___
- Week 2: ___
- Week 3: ___

Week 4-6: Building
- Week 4: ___
- Week 5: ___
- Week 6: ___

Week 7-9: Accelerating
- Week 7: ___
- Week 8: ___
- Week 9: ___

Week 10-12: Completing
- Week 10: ___
- Week 11: ___
- Week 12: ___

Daily action: ___ (15-30 minutes)
Tracking: [spreadsheet/app/journal]
Accountability: [person who will check in with you]

exercises.title: Weekly Review
exercises.description:
Set a recurring weekly reminder (Sunday evening). Spend 30 minutes answering:
1. What did I accomplish this week?
2. What didn't get done and why?
3. What did I learn?
4. What are my top 3 priorities for next week?
5. Am I on track for my 90-day goal?
hints: Be honest — this is for you, not for show
Celebrate wins, no matter how small

solution.code:
Weekly Review Template:
Date: ___

This week I accomplished:
1. ___
2. ___
3. ___

Didn't get done:
- ___ (reason: ___)

Lessons learned:
- ___

Next week's top 3:
1. ___
2. ___
3. ___

90-day goal progress: [on track / behind / ahead]
Adjustment needed: ___

Self-rating this week (1-10): ___
